name: VideoVault Premiere Extension
releaseNotes:
- Sharper, tighter extension spacing inspired by modern creative tools.
- One-click CTA for missing proxy creation after `Verify Cache`.
- Theme tokens centralized so future shell themes are easier to support.
- Ready-state proxy source toggle now hides when a project has zero proxy-relevant clips.
- Refined the simplified `Home`, `Proxies`, and `Comments` shell with denser spacing and smaller radii.
- Added an explicit missing-proxy callout:
- shows how many files still need proxies on VideoVault Server
- lets the editor request creation with one click
- Kept the existing `PROXY_NEEDED` bridge path intact:
- Premiere extension detects missing proxies
- VideoVault Connect requests a Central grant
- the NAS enqueues real proxy jobs
- Centralized shell and legacy visual tokens so theme changes do not require scattered hardcoded color edits.
- Hid the active proxy source toggle when there are `0` proxy-relevant clips, so the UI does not show a meaningless switch.
- Extension version bumped to `1.7.1`.
- Update `extensions/adobe-premiere/latest.json` in `videovault-release-updates` after packaging the new macOS and Windows installers.
- Release tag should follow:
- `premiere-extension-v1.7.1`
